calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Default Prove Up Hearing; Summary Of The Case
Off Calendar Aug-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos and Mars Goodman, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Robert F. Cohen, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff, American Express Bank, FSB,
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Vijay Patel,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $37,126.52
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $753.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $37,880.02
Attorneys fees and interest is waived.
Judgment signed in open court.
